// about me

The Story Behind the Code

I'm Atharva Shevate, a Computer Engineer with a strong foundation across AI engineering, full-stack development, and cloud systems. I'm currently working as an AI Engineer at IOTIOT.IN, where I build LLM-powered automation pipelines, RAG frameworks, and AI integrations that solve real problems for enterprise clients.

My work isn't limited to AI. I'm equally comfortable writing production code in Python, JavaScript, and C/C++, designing MySQL-backed systems, building REST APIs, and deploying applications with Docker on AWS EC2. I like understanding a problem fully before I write a single line of code, and I care as much about clean architecture as I do about the end result.

"I believe in building things properly — code that's not just functional, but clean, scalable, and genuinely useful. Whether I'm training a model or deploying a server, the goal is always the same: build something that works reliably, end to end."

That mindset shows up across my projects — a computer vision classifier reaching 90% accuracy, a multi-agent AI orchestration system, a cloud monitoring platform with automated self-healing, an application security hardening project, and a Power BI analytics dashboard. Different domains, same approach: understand the problem, choose the right tools, and ship something solid.
